method: LLM research (property facts, no prices) -> yt-dlp YouTube search -> on-property title verification (>=70% of distinctive name tokens must appear in the video title; listicles, sub-4min teasers and >90min vlogs rejected) -> full extract for real upload year. Video IDs come from YouTube search results only, never from a model.
